Precondition: red_block is on top of green_block and both end effectors are free.
Postcondition: Right end effector is grasping red_block.

Precondition: Right end effector holds red_block and the table area to the right of green_block is clear.
Postcondition: red_block is placed on the table to the right of green_block and right end effector is free.

Precondition: green_block is fully exposed on the table and left end effector is free.
Postcondition: Left end effector is grasping green_block.
